name: Trifox / FoxGrid
description: A visual memory and imagination training game based on reconstructing geometric forms from memory. Strengthens visual working memory, spatial reasoning, pattern recognition, and mental imagery.

name: Avirlog · Breath Tracker
description: The breath tracker. Avirlog — from avir, Hebrew for air — makes breathing visible, measurable, and trainable: observe your respiratory patterns and build self-regulation through breath awareness.

name: Water Drop Meditation Device
description: A physical meditation mechanism using water, rhythm, sound, anticipation, and silence to draw attention into the present moment.

name: Swordfight
description: A sword-fighting game built around timing, distance, and reading your opponent — fast to pick up, hard to master.

name: Spacepoint · Ipoint
description: Two prototypes that turn IMU motion into interface: Spacepoint — a 3D pyramid/sphere motion demo — and Ipoint, a ZUPT point-controller. Orientation, gesture, and movement in space become touch-free input.

name: Mission Control
description: A mission-control board for managing projects and tasks — plan, track, and steer everything from one place. Hebrew UI.

name: MechCalc
description: Engineering calculators for mechanical design — quick, precise, field-ready. Paired with MechCalc Academy, an interactive combat-engineering study companion.

name: Image Detect Guide
description: An interactive drone-identification academy — a self-paced visual guide to image detection and recognition. Hebrew.

name: Justaum · Aum Studio
description: A minimal sound-and-meditation studio built around the Aum tone — drone, rhythm, and stillness for daily practice.

name: Trader Bro
description: Tools for trading — a companion that keeps the process disciplined: setups, checklists, and decision support instead of impulse.
